testcase.name: test_consolidated_page_navigation

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.click: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for get_by_role("link", name="Use Cases").first

testcase.failure: tests/consolidated/test_consolidated.py:22: in test_consolidated_page_navigation page.get_by_role("link", name="Use Cases").first.click() ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/sync_api/_generated.py:15631: in click self._sync( ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_locator.py:162: in click return await self._frame._click(self._selector, strict=True, **params) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:566: in _click await self._channel.send("click", self._timeout, locals_to_params(locals())) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:69: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:559: in wrap_api_call raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.click: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. E Call log: E - waiting for get_by_role("link", name="Use Cases").first

testcase.name: test_consolidated_page_video_button

failure.message: AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible Actual value: None Error: Unexpected token "point(" while parsing css selector "point(524,871)". Did you mean to CSS.escape it? Call log: - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for point(524,871)

testcase.failure: tests/consolidated/test_consolidated.py:72: in test_consolidated_page_video_button expect(page.locator("point(524,871)")).to_be_visible(timeout=15000) E AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible E Actual value: None E Error: Unexpected token "point(" while parsing css selector "point(524,871)". Did you mean to CSS.escape it? E Call log: E - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms E - waiting for point(524,871)

testcase.name: test_TC_ContactForm_01

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.fill: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator("#firstName").first

testcase.name: test_TC_ContactForm_02
testcase.failure: tests/page_2_f871/test_page_2_f871.py:39: in test_TC_ContactForm_02 page.wait_for_load_state('networkidle') ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/sync_api/_generated.py:9152: in wait_for_load_state self._sync(self._impl_obj.wait_for_load_state(state=state, timeout=timeout)) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_page.py:572: in wait_for_load_state return await self._main_frame.wait_for_load_state(**locals_to_params(locals())) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:273: in wait_for_load_state return await self._wait_for_load_state_impl(state, timeout) ../venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:301: in _wait_for_load_state_impl await waiter.result() E playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Timeout 30000ms exceeded.
